description: Three classifiers, each trained on a single AI generator + all human texts. Evaluated on the full test set with per-generator breakdown.
key_findings: Training on GPT-4o-mini alone causes the largest generalization drop on DeepSeek (0.825, a 17.5 percentage point drop from baseline 1.000).
Training on Gemini alone also struggles on DeepSeek (0.910), while training on DeepSeek alone transfers most uniformly.
Each generator has a distinct stylistic signature that cannot be inferred from a single other generator.
